title: MCPVP Ranked
description: Ranked PvP system for Minecraft. Track ELO, climb leaderboards, and compete across multiple kits.
body:
### Compete in ranked PvP across servers like mcpvp.club and minemen.club with a fully automated ELO system.

## ⚔️ What's Implemented so far?
- ELO tracking
- Global + per-kit leaderboards
- Multiple kits (Sword, Axe, Crystal, Netherite OP, ect.)
- Clean in-game UI
- Match history + stats tracking

## 🧠 How It Works
- Play matches on supported servers
- Complete 10 placement matches
- Get ranked from Stone → Dragon
- Climb the leaderboard

## 💡 Why MCPvP Ranked?
Unlike other PvP mods, MCPvP Ranked:
- Works across multiple servers
- Tracks real performance
- Has per-kit ranking systems
- Focuses on competitive progression

## 🔮 Coming Soon
- Cosmetics
- Seasonal resets
- Tournaments

# [Discord](https://discord.gg/HEXZpeXJNv)
